security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: ipc: blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' tauri: ipc: blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' tauri: ipc: blob: data: https://static2.sharepointonline.com https://spoprod-a.akamaihd.net; img-src * data: file: blob: tauri: ipc:; font-src 'self' file: tauri: ipc: https://static2.sharepointonline.com https://spoprod-a.akamaihd.net; connect-src * http: https: file: tauri: ipc: ws: wss:; frame-src * 'self' tauri: ipc: data: blob:; worker-src * 'self' tauri: ipc: blob:;

bundle.longDescription: Fluent Reader is a modern desktop RSS reader built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.
